items.rationale: group screenshots into a single curation album
group downloaded/whatsapp content into a single album
group pre-2020 photos for archival review
identify near-duplicates and surface them; never auto-delete

safetyRules: Apply mode performs ONLY album-add operations and tag/label-style metadata.
Never delete media. Never remove from existing albums without explicit per-item approval.
Each item must be in the approval package to be applied.
